description:
A ready-to-use operational setup that gives open-source and public-goods builder teams the legal and financial infrastructure to receive funding, pay contributors, and operate compliantly from day one.

Structured as a Swiss Association — a cost-efficient, privacy-preserving legal form with strong international recognition — the Operational Hub reduces personal liability for contributors, simplifies compliance, and provides a professional foundation for teams that are already doing the work.

services.description: Professionally drafted contract templates for contributor agreements, internal Multisig Agreements, and other operational needs.
services.title: Legal document templates

services.description: A global invoice generation tool that creates professionally structured invoices following international best practices, while remaining independent from any specific legal or tax jurisdiction.
services.title: Global invoice generator

services.description: A budget planning tool that helps organizations allocate resources across teams, projects, and categories following financial best practices, with defined budget categories and time horizons.
services.title: Budget generator

services.description: A guided self-assessment to help teams evaluate their operational and legal needs before choosing a plan.
services.title: Needs analysis

services.description: Formation of a Swiss Association with the support of a Swiss licensed counsel. Includes onboarding checklist,  use of templates for founding documents and articles of association, a workshop, and a founding meeting with counsel.
services.title: Swiss association setup

services.description: A registered legal address in Zug, Switzerland for the entity.
services.title: Registered address (Zug)

services.description: VAT registration and issuance of a VAT number. If the entity is not registered in the Commercial registry, the VAT ID may serve as the company identification number with customers and suppliers.
services.title: VAT registration

services.description: Structured support for Swiss annual tax compliance and VAT reporting (by default, quarterly), handled by licensed tax professionals, coordinated through our operational framework. Documentation for Swiss VAT reporting, ensuring that all relevant invoices, payment records, and transaction classifications are properly maintained to support accurate VAT filings and potential audits by the Swiss Federal Tax Administration (FTA).
services.title: Annual tax filing and VAT reporting

services.description: Expense tracking and reimbursement workflows.
services.title: Reimbursement management

services.description: End-to-end handling of invoices from submission and approval to accounting and payment.
services.title: Invoice management

services.description: Reconciliation of transactions, validation of balances, and accurate financial records in the accounting system for reporting and decision-making.
services.title: Monthly accounting & close

services.description: A report of all expenses incurred during the month, categorized and reviewed to provide visibility into spending and budget performance.
services.title: Monthly expense report

services.description: Defined rules governing how expenses are submitted, approved, and reimbursed.
services.title: Expense policies

services.description: Operational processes to onboard contributors, manage contracts, and payment details.
services.title: Contributor onboarding and operations

services.description: Crypto-to-fiat conversions with 48-hour transfers in USD, GBP, EUR, CHF, and DKK. Additional currencies available upon request.
services.title: Multi-currency payouts

services.description: Dedicated operational support with an assigned point of contact for handling day-to-day financial and administrative requests.
services.title: Dedicated ops support

services.description: Operational support across multiple legal entities, with consolidated oversight and coordinated financial workflows.
services.title: Multiple entities

services.description: A dedicated account manager for overseeing the relationship and coordinating ongoing requests.
services.title: Dedicated account manager

services.description: An informative admin portal providing visibility into billing, active services, and key operational documents.
services.title: Admin portal

services.description: Tailored operational workflows and reporting structures.
services.title: Custom workflows & reporting

services.description: Setup of centralized exchange accounts (Kraken, Coinbase, Binance, Bitfinex, Crypto.com, Nexo).
services.title: Exchange account setup

services.description: Crypto-friendly banking services setup.
services.title: Crypto-friendly bank setup

services.description: Off-ramp setup for fiat conversion.
services.title: Payment provider & off-ramp setup

services.description: Payroll setup with local Professional Employer Organization providers.
services.title: EOR/PEO setup

services.description: Setting up crypto payments for second-party approval based on invoices received.
services.title: Payment controls & reconciliation

services.description: Assistance in coordinating financial information to support external audits.
services.title: Audit support

services.description: Maintaining accounts with EORs/PEOs and other suppliers to reduce the risk of being offboarded.
services.title: Supplier & partner liaison

services.description: Regular checks on contractors and clients for sanctions, PEP status, and other compliance flags. Monitoring of connected wallets for risk assessment. Regular compliance reports.
services.title: AML monitoring & compliance reporting

services.description: Assist in preparing documents needed by individuals showing income/affiliation for visas, loans, or other purposes.
services.title: Contractor documentation support

services.description: Monitor incoming invoices for compliance to make sure invoices contain everything needed under local law prior to payment.
services.title: Invoice compliance review

services.description: Monitor connected accounts, assist with creating new cards/users, and monitor for dubious/restricted transactions.
services.title: Card & spend operations

services.description: Five additional hours of legal advice provided by Swiss counsel.
services.title: Legal counsel advice

services.description: Finds, compiles, and summarizes information from connected sources on request
services.title: Information Retrieval

services.description: Produces structured documents from templates, data inputs, or natural language instructions
services.title: Document generation

services.description: Fills forms, updates records, and populates fields across connected systems
services.title: Data entry & form completion

services.description: Runs multi-step processes autonomously end-to-end based on triggers or instructions
services.title: Workflow execution

services.description: Identifies tasks outside scope and hands off to the right human or system with context
services.title: Task routing & escalation

services.description: Aggregates data and produces structured reports or digests on a schedule or on demand
services.title: Reporting & Summarization

summary: A turnkey legal and operational setup for open-source builder teams — entity formation, invoicing, payouts, and compliance bundled under one roof.
title: Operational Hub
